headline: How The Invesco (IVZ) Story Is Evolving As Analysts Rework Valuation Targets
summary: Invesco’s modeled fair value has been trimmed slightly from US$30.14 to US$29.86, a small move that still matters if you are tracking where analysts think the shares should land. Across the Street, some firms are lifting price targets by up to US$4 while others shave them by US$1 to US$2, reflecting that bulls and bears are reading the same flow and execution data quite differently. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader narrative and what to watch as it...
